---
title: "Data Overview"
subtitle: "Raw inputs, derived datasets, and variable definitions"
---

This page documents the datasets used in this project ‚Äî both the raw survey files received from Statistics Canada and the analysis-ready tables produced by the data pipeline.

---

## Raw Input Data

Two cycles of the Canadian Community Health Survey (CCHS) are the primary inputs.

| File | Cycle | Rows | Columns | Format |
|------|-------|-----:|--------:|--------|
| `CCHS2010_LOP.sav` | 2010‚Äì2011 | ~62,909 | 1,500+ | SPSS `.sav` |
| `CCHS_2014_EN_PUMF.sav` | 2013‚Äì2014 | ~63,522 | 1,500+ | SPSS `.sav` |

Both files are PUMF (Public Use Microdata Files) administered by Statistics Canada.
Both include the **Loss of Production (LOP)** module, which contains the work-absenteeism variables.

Raw files are stored in `data-private/raw/2026-02-19/` and are **not committed to the repository** (private data).

---

## Primary Outcome Variable

`absence_days_total` is constructed by summing work days missed across eight health-reason categories:

| Health Reason | CCHS Variable | Description |
|---------------|--------------|-------------|
| Chronic condition | `LOPG040` | Days lost due to chronic condition |
| Injuries | `LOPG070` | Days missed due to injury |
| Cold | `LOPG082` | Days missed due to cold |
| Flu / Influenza | `LOPG083` | Days missed due to flu |
| Stomach flu | `LOPG084` | Days missed due to stomach flu |
| Respiratory infection | `LOPG085` | Days missed due to respiratory infection |
| Other infectious disease | `LOPG086` | Days missed due to other infectious disease |
| Other physical/mental health | `LOPG100` | Days missed ‚Äî other health reason |

A secondary (sensitivity) outcome is `absence_days_chronic` (`LOPG040` alone).

---

## Sample Construction Variables

| Purpose | Variable | Description |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| Age filter | `DHHGAGE` | Include respondents aged 15‚Äì75 (codes 2‚Äì15) |
| Employment filter | `LOP_015` | Include only those employed in past 3 months (code = 1) |
| Proxy exclusion | `ADM_PRX` | Exclude proxy-completed interviews (code = 1) |

---

## Survey Design Variables

| Purpose | Variable | Description |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| Master survey weight | `WTS_M` | Used for population-representative estimates |
| Strata / health region | `GEODPMF` | Province of residence; used as strata in survey design |
| Bootstrap weights | `BSW001`‚Äì`BSW500` | 500 replicates for variance estimation |

Two cycles are **pooled** by dividing all weights by 2 per Statistics Canada guidelines:

```
weight_pooled = WTS_M / 2    (per respondent)
bsw*_pooled   = BSW* / 2     (same for all 500 bootstrap weights)
```

---

## Analysis-Ready Datasets (Lane 3)

Produced by running `manipulation/3-ellis.R`. Stored in `data-private/derived/cchs-3.sqlite` and `cchs-3-tables/*.parquet`.

| Table | Rows | Description |
|-------|-----:|-------------|
| `cchs_analytical` | 126,431 | Full pooled sample (both cycles, all employment statuses) |
| `cchs_employed` | ~64,248 | Employed respondents only (`employment_code == 1`) |
| `cchs_unemployed` | remainder | Not-employed remainder |
| `sample_flow` | 5 | Exclusion audit trail |
| `data_dictionary` | ‚Äî | Column-level documentation for all renames and exclusions |

**EDA 2** draws from the `cchs_employed` table (64,248 rows).

**Parquet is the primary format** ‚Äî it preserves R factor types and level ordering.
SQLite is a secondary convenience format for SQL exploration.

---

## Key Lane 3 Column Renames

| Original | Renamed | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `cycle` | `survey_cycle_id` | Survey cycle identifier |
| `lop_015` | `employment_code` | Employment status |
| `adm_prx` | `proxy_code` | Proxy respondent flag |
| `days_absent_total` | `absence_days_total` | Primary outcome |
| `days_absent_chronic` | `absence_days_chronic` | Sensitivity outcome |
| `wts_m_pooled` | `weight_pooled` | Pooled survey weight |
| `wts_m_original` | `weight_original` | Original survey weight |
| `geodpmf` | `geo_region_id` | Health region / strata |

---

## Public Example Data

Small fictional and demo datasets in `data-public/` are committed to the repository and used in EDA 1:

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `data-public/raw/mtcars.csv` | Classic R `mtcars` dataset (32 rows) |
| `data-public/raw/fictional/example-prosthetic-1.csv` | Demo dataset |
| `data-public/raw/fictional/example-prosthetic-2.csv` | Demo dataset |

---

For pipeline execution details see [Pipeline](pipeline.qmd).
